data.title: Spanish Coffee Chain Vanadi Coffee Expands Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Spanish coffee chain Vanadi Coffee has announced an increase in its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 20 BTC, bringing its total to 54 BTC. The company's shareholders have approved a strategic shift aimed at positioning Vanadi Coffee as Spain's largest publicly traded Bitcoin company. As part of this strategy, the company plans to invest up to 1 billion euros in Bitcoin acquisitions.

data.title: Metaplanet to Inject $5B Into US Arm to Boost Bitcoin Drive
data.description:
Catenaa, Sunday, June 29, 2025-Japan-based Metaplanet said Tuesday its board approved a $5 billion capital contribution to its U. S. subsidiary, signaling a major push to expand its global bitcoin-focused strategy. The move follows the company’s establishment of its American unit in Miami last month as part of an aggressive international growth plan. Metaplanet said the […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/metaplanet-to-inject-5b-into-us-arm-to-boost-bitcoin-drive

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Fuel Network (FUEL), Users with at least 170 Binance Alpha Points Can Participate in the Airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha is now online on Fuel Network (FUEL).
Eligible Binance users can use Binance Alpha points to claim 5,550 FUEL tokens airdrop on the Alpha event page within 24 hours after the start of trading.
Users with at least 170 Binance Alpha points can participate in the airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends.
Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Over 25% of South Koreans in their 20s–50s now invest in digital assets
data.description:
Over 25% of South Koreans aged 20 to 50 now hold digital assets, with crypto accounting for 14% of their overall financial portfolios, according to a new report by the Hana Institute of Finance. According to the report, 31% of crypto ownership is held by investors in their 40s, 28% in their 30s, and 25% […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-koreans-invest-in-digital-assets/

data.title: Spanish coffee chain Vanadi Coffee increases holdings by 20 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Spanish coffee chain Vanadi Coffee announced that it has increased its holdings by 20 BTC and now owns 54 BTC. The company's shareholders' meeting has approved the company's strategic shift to become the largest listed Bitcoin company in Spain and will invest up to 1 billion euros to purchase Bitcoin.

data.title: Michael Saylor Hints at Bitcoin Accumulation Strategy
data.description: According to Odaily, Michael Saylor, Executive Chairman of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), has once again shared insights related to Bitcoin on the X platform. In his latest post, Saylor stated, "In 21 years, you will wish you had bought more." Typically, following such posts, Strategy reveals its Bitcoin acquisition data the next day.

data.title: Trump's approval rating hits all-time low
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to a report by Reference News, citing the website of Newsweek, the latest Newsweek poll shows that US President Trump's approval rating has fallen to an all-time low. The survey shows that 43% of Americans are currently satisfied with Trump's performance, 53% are dissatisfied, and his net approval rating is negative 10%. According to reports, Trump's poll numbers initially fell sharply after he announced the "Liberation Day" tariffs in April this year. Although his approval rating quickly rebounded, his recent behavior seems to have reignited public dissatisfaction with the White House.

data.title: OneKey: OneKey resources have no connection with Resupply and have never organized or manipulated any public opinion attacks.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto wallet provider OneKey issued a statement in its X community saying that it has never instigated, organized or manipulated any KOL or user in any form to launch a public opinion attack on Curve or any project. OneKey will pursue legal responsibility for the malicious accusations and false statements spread by some individuals on the current social platform and will never tolerate them. In addition, the founder Mr. Yishi participated in the investment entirely in his personal capacity, which is his personal behavior. No official resources of OneKey are involved in the project. At the same time. All OneKey products are open source designs, without backdoors, and have been fully audited by professional security teams such as SlowMist.

data.title: Just DAO Announces Changes to JustLend USDJ Market Parameters
data.description: According to PANews, Just DAO has announced significant adjustments to the JustLend platform's USDJ market on the X platform. The collateral rate will be reduced from 75% to 0%, and the reserve rate will increase from 5% to 100%. These changes are set to take effect on June 29, 2025, at approximately 23:59 UTC+8. Currently, the supply and lending functions for USDJ have been suspended as market parameters are being adjusted to facilitate a gradual market exit.

data.title: Michael Saylor releases Bitcoin Tracker information again, and may disclose holdings data next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor, executive chairman of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), once again released information related to Bitcoin Tracker on the X platform. This time he wrote: "21 years later, you will wish you had bought more." Usually, he will disclose Strategy's Bitcoin holdings data the day after releasing Bitcoin Tracker information.
